events.summary: Prep for work load balancing Discussion with Team

prep.summary: Review your Google Drive Work Notes to prepare for the upcoming team workload balancing discussion—specifically focusing on your July 6 meeting with Deepak. Address the severe resource constraints in your Line of Business (LOB) data architecture support—where Integration Architects are currently overwhelmed by data movement and third-party vendor integrations. Execute the plan to recruit Chris back part-time to alleviate this strain—while establishing a ground-up view of team capacity during your upcoming workload rebalancing workshop.
tasks: Schedule a prep session with Praveen to align on the ground-up team capacity workshop—ensuring you obtain an uninhibited dialogue without executive presence.
Meet with John and Adam to finalize bringing Chris back part-time—directly resolving the P&C team's data architecture resourcing struggles.
Rebalance immediate tasks away from the heavily strained claims team—utilizing direct team feedback rather than relying solely on Jira metrics.
Address the security risk assessment blocking transactional SMS/DNS communication—coordinating with security to find alternative encryption and compliance pathways.
prep.title: Prep for work load balancing Discussion with Team

prep.summary: Prep unavailable — Gemini was unreachable when this brief was built.
prep.title: Review 2 Way SMS Risk Assessment
